name: Marshall Wells Community Association
description: Gold-set evaluation questions for the Marshall Wells Community Association insurance portfolio. Covers policy coverage limits, expiring policies, Fannie Mae/FHA compliance, and premium amounts.

questions.question: What is the General Liability coverage limit for Marshall Wells Community Association?
What is the aggregate General Liability limit?
What is the property coverage limit for the Marshall Wells common area buildings?
What is the Directors and Officers (D&O) liability limit?
What is the fidelity bond / employee dishonesty coverage limit?
When does the current General Liability policy expire?
When does the property insurance policy expire?
Does the Marshall Wells Community Association policy meet Fannie Mae insurance requirements?
Does the association carry the FHA-required fidelity bond coverage?
What is the annual premium for the General Liability policy?
